projects.name: GRDN
projects.shortStatus: iOS build re-run pending; Live Activity bug in flight
projects.note: iOS: exit-65 archive fix pushed (commit e27ba73, build 1.11.3+4) — rive_native native library now built on CI before the archive; re-run pending. Web: already live at grdnapp.com. Home-screen redesign delivered — full analysis, an ideal-home-screen spec (one job: start a focus session against today's top task; one bright button; the garden fills the dead space), and a copy-paste Google Stitch prompt. Spec saved to docs/homescreen-redesign.md. A task is also investigating a bug where the 10-minute Gate Pause Live Activity does not clear when the countdown finishes.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.shortStatus: v1.10.0 shipped; deploy fix + width markers + 13-point export in flight
projects.note: v1.10.0 shipped: single-photo scan, optional flash toggle, and a reworked toe profile that traces the front foot edge in the full-resolution photo (~0.1mm per pixel, far sharper than the old 320px mask) so the five toe-tip peaks resolve even when toes touch. An urgent task is fixing a broken/stale GitHub Pages deploy Jeremy hit: a JS chunk fails to load and the live site was serving pre-v1.9.0 code.
projects.nextStep: Deploy fix in progress. Then the 10% width-station markers get drawn onto the outline visual, then the 13-point export (5 toe tips, inside big toe, 2 ball-cross-section edges, 2 arch-cross-section edges, 3 heel) for Jeremy's Grasshopper algorithm.

A task is still completing every channel and gate interpretation so nothing shows a 'not written yet' placeholder. A context-aware compatibility-scoring spec was delivered to Jeremy to review.

projects.name: AI Voice Agent

Try it now with 'npm run harness'. Everything buildable without external services is done. Repo: giddyuptiger/primal-agent (commit 96ded86).
